data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to a failure in the LLM evaluation call.
data.assessment: The exploratory step 'Validate persona scenario #5' is blocked because the LLM evaluation call failed, preventing any conclusive scoring of the validation. Without the LLM assessment, it is impossible to determine if the scenario behavior is supported or if it produces a failure report. This lack of evaluative data leads to an inconclusive status for this step.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic check
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Implement explicit endpoint + assertion contract for this exploratory requirement.
